debug_info.goal:
Ident : Type u_1
ε : @Graphiti.FinEnv Ident (String × String)
a : List String
⊢ ∃ b,
    a.length = b.length ∧
      (∀ (a' b' : String), (a', b') ∈ a.zip b → ¬Batteries.AssocList.contains (a', b') ε = true) ∧ (a.zip b).Nodup

failed_attempts:
refine ⟨List.replicate a.length "", ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simp
  · intro a' b' hmem
    have : b' = "" := by
      have hb : b' ∈ List.replicate a.length "" := by
        exact List.mem_of_mem_zip_right hmem
      simpa [List.mem_replicate] using hb
    subst this
    intro h
    cases h
  · simpa using (List.nodup_zip_left (l₁ := a) (l₂ := List.replicate a.length "") (by simp) (by simp))

refine ⟨a, by simp, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro a' b' hmem
    have : a' = b' := by
      simpa using (List.mem_zip.mp hmem).2
    subst this
    simp
  · simpa using (List.zip_self_nodup (l := a))

refine ⟨a, rfl, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro a' b' hmem
    have : a' = b' := by
      have := List.mem_zip.mp hmem
      exact this.1
    subst this
    simp
  · simpa using (List.nodup_zip_right.2 (List.nodup_nil))

refine ⟨a, by simp, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro a' b' hmem
    have : a' = b' := by
      have : (a', b') ∈ (a.zip a) := by simpa using hmem
      exact (List.mem_zip.mp this).2
    simp [this]
  · simpa using (List.nodup_zip_right (l₁ := a) (l₂ := a) (by simp) (List.nodup_keys_iff.mp (by simp)))

refine ⟨List.replicate a.length "", by simp, ?_, ?_⟩
